name: Salmon Fillets W/Horseradish-Potato Crust
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 small potatoes, boiling, jumbo egg size
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until just tender, then chill and peel.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F. Grate the potato with large holes on a grater, pressing lightly for thin shavings. Season with salt and pepper and toss with oil.
3. Spread horseradish evenly on each fillet and season with salt and pepper.
4. Gently pat the potato topping onto the surface of the fish, pressing lightly so it sticks.
5. Bake until the topping is golden brown and crisp, and the fish is tender all the way through when poked with a thin knife or skewer, 15-18 minutes. If the topping seems like it's going to burn before the crust is done, turn the oven down to 375°F. If the topping isn't crisp but the fish is almost cooked through, switch to broil for the last few minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
